title: Setting Up and Connecting to the Company VPN on macOS
text:
Q: How do I set up and connect to the company VPN on macOS?
A: Step 1: Click on the Apple menu in the top-left corner of your screen and select 'System Preferences'. Step 2: In the System Preferences window, click on 'Network'. Step 3: In the Network window, click the '+' button at the bottom left to add a new connection. Step 4: In the 'Interface' dropdown, select 'VPN', and in the 'VPN Type' dropdown, choose 'L2TP over IPsec'. Step 5: Enter a name for the VPN connection in the 'Service Name' field (e.g., 'Company VPN'). Step 6: In the 'Server Address' field, enter the VPN server address provided by your IT department. Step 7: In the 'Account Name' field, enter your company username. Step 8: Click on 'Authentication Settings', enter your password, and the shared secret provided by IT, then click 'OK'. Step 9: Click 'Apply' to save your settings. Step 10: To connect, select the VPN connection from the list and click 'Connect'. You should now be connected to the company VPN.
